industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Sinoma Energy Conservation Ltd.
summary: Sinoma Energy Conservation Ltd. provides technical, engineering, and investment services in the fields of industrial energy conservation, building energy conservation, energy comprehensive management, and environmental protection services in China and internationally. It designs, constructs, finances, and operates waste heat power generation projects on build-operate-transfer basis. The company also undertakes energy management contracts; offers engineering, procurement, and construction services for waste heat power generation projects; provides engineering design and consultation services for waste heat power generation projects; and undertakes clean development mechanism projects. It serves cement, steel, metallurgy, chemical, and other industries. The company is based in Tianjin, China. Sinoma Energy Conservation Ltd. is a subsidiary of China National Building Material Group Co., Ltd.
